paper_title: Borehole Temperature Profiles and GSTH Analysis

methods.description: Process for collecting and preparing borehole temperature profiles for heat flow determination in the Canadian Shield.

steps.description: The borehole temperature profiles used in this study were obtained by researchers at GEOTOP and at the Institut de Physique du Globe de Paris (IPGP) over the past twenty years.
steps.searchable_summary: obtain borehole temperature profiles from GEOTOP and IPGP

steps.description: In order to give the same weight to deep boreholes in the simultaneous inversion, all boreholes deeper than 550 m were truncated to that depth.
steps.searchable_summary: truncate borehole data deeper than 550 m

steps.description: All boreholes shallower than approximately 350 m were automatically rejected.
steps.searchable_summary: reject borehole data shallower than 350 m

steps.description: Each profile was carefully examined and when necessary erratic data points in the shallow part of the profile were removed.
steps.searchable_summary: remove erratic data points from borehole profiles

methods.method_name: Thermal Conductivity and Heat Generation Measurement
methods.description: Process for measuring thermal conductivity and heat generation from core samples collected from boreholes.

steps.description: For each borehole, core samples were collected to measure their thermal conductivity.
steps.searchable_summary: collect core samples for thermal conductivity measurement

steps.description: Thermal conductivity is determined by the method of divided bars.
steps.searchable_summary: determine thermal conductivity using divided bars method

steps.description: Heat generation is also determined for the heat flow studies.
steps.searchable_summary: determine heat generation for heat flow studies

methods.method_name: Synthetic Data Testing for SVD Method
methods.description: Testing the SVD method for simultaneous inversions using synthetic temperature depth profiles.

steps.description: The SVD method for simultaneous inversions has been thoroughly tested for regional GSTH by using multiple series of 84 synthetic temperature depth profiles.
steps.searchable_summary: test SVD method using synthetic temperature depth profiles

steps.description: Further tests with series of synthetic temperature depth profiles showed that GSTHs obtained from reduced profiles accurately recover the input.
steps.searchable_summary: validate GSTH recovery from reduced profiles
